papers.title_en: BiMaxKAN: A KAN-based dual-branch network for medical image segmentation with interpretability analysis
papers.tldr: 针对医疗图像分割中泛化能力有限、边界分割不精确及模型缺乏可解释性等挑战，本文提出了一种基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）的双分支架构BiMaxKAN。该模型通过创新的双分支设计增强了对复杂解剖结构的特征提取能力，并利用KAN的数学特性提升了模型的透明度。实验结果表明，BiMaxKAN在多个医疗影像数据集上均取得了优异的分割精度，同时为临床决策提供了更具可解释性的分析依据。
papers.abstract_en: Deep-learning-based approaches for medical image segmentation have maderemarkable achievements. However, existing approaches still suffer from limitedgeneralization capability, insufficient boundary segmentation performance and poor …

papers.title_en: Radiomic prediction of substantial LVSI in endometrial cancer using reduced field of view DWI-a feasibility study
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用小视野扩散加权成像（rFOV DWI）的影像组学特征预测子宫内膜癌中广泛性脉管浸润（LVSI）的可行性。针对2023年FIGO新分期对广泛性LVSI的重视，研究通过分析rFOV DWI图像构建预测模型。结果表明，该方法能有效识别高危LVSI状态，为术前精准分期和治疗决策提供了无创的影像学支持。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives The revised FIGO 2023 for endometrial cancer (EC) incorporateslymphovascular space invasion (LVSI) into staging and explicitly designates onlysubstantial/extensive LVSI as adverse. While reduced field-of-view diffusion …

papers.title_en: Outcome-driven dosimetry optimization for [177Lu] Lu-PSMA-617 radiopharmaceutical therapy: proof of concept on single time point dosimetry optimization
papers.tldr: 本研究针对[177Lu] Lu-PSMA-617放射性药物治疗，提出了一种以临床结果为导向的剂量学优化方法。传统方法侧重于物理剂量准确性，而本研究通过单时间点（STP）剂量学优化，旨在建立剂量与治疗效果之间的直接联系。作为概念验证，该方法简化了临床流程，同时保持了对治疗反应的预测能力，为个性化放射治疗提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose Internal dosimetry in radiopharmaceutical therapy (RPT) traditionallyprioritizes methodological optimization driven by physical dose accuracy. However,even recommended multiple-time-point (MTP) dosimetry remains subject to …

papers.title_en: Misplaced Central Venous Catheters and Retained Guidewires: A “Never Event” Pictorial Review and Case Series Analysis
papers.tldr: 本研究通过图解回顾和系列病例分析，探讨了中心静脉置管（CVC）过程中发生的导管错位和导丝遗留等“绝不应发生事件”。尽管超声引导技术已广泛应用，但在急诊等高压环境下，此类严重并发症仍有发生。文章通过展示典型案例，旨在提高临床医生对置管风险的警惕，并强调规范化操作与术后影像确认在预防医疗事故中的核心作用。
papers.abstract_en: The central venous catheter (CVC) plays an important role in the management ofpatients. Often, the deployment is in emergency situations, and despite theavailability of sonological guidance, there are remote chances of a guidewire being …

papers.title_en: Adaptive Attention-Guided Deep–Texture Fusion Framework for Robust Multi-Class Lung Disease Classification using Chest X-Ray Images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对新冠肺炎、肺炎和肺结核等肺部疾病的快速诊断需求，提出了一种自适应注意力引导的深度-纹理融合框架。该方法通过结合深度学习特征与图像纹理特征，并引入自适应注意力机制，显著提升了胸部X射线图像在多类别疾病分类中的鲁棒性和准确性，为医疗资源受限地区的临床诊断提供了高效的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: The correct and timely identification of lung diseases such as COVID-19, Pneumoniaand Tuberculosis is among the most crucial clinical phenomena, particularly in theconstrained health care facilities. The current article recommends the adaptive …

papers.title_en: MIMIC-CXR-VQA: A Large-Scale LLM-Annotated Dataset and Comparative Benchmark for Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床放射科中胸部X射线（CXR）解释耗时且专家资源有限的问题，提出了MIMIC-CXR-VQA数据集。这是一个利用大语言模型（LLM）进行标注的大规模医学视觉问答数据集，并构建了相应的对比基准。该工作为自动化医学影像分析提供了重要资源，旨在提升医疗诊断的效率和准确性。
papers.abstract_en: The interpretation of chest X-rays (CXRs) is a critical yet time-consuming task inclinical radiology, often limited by the availability of expert radiologists. To addressthis challenge, we introduce a new large-scale medical Visual Question Answering …

papers.title_en: Mix-to-Max: Optimizing Data Mixtures for Peak Vision-Language Efficiency
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉指令微调（VIT）中存在的数据冗余和计算开销问题，提出了 Mix-to-Max 方法。该方法旨在通过优化数据混合比例，在保持或提升大视觉语言模型（LVLM）泛化能力的同时，显著提高训练效率。研究通过实验证明了优化后的数据组合能以更少的计算资源达到更优的模型性能，为高效构建多模态模型提供了新策略。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Visual Instruction Tuning (VIT) endows Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) with powerful generalization capabilities across diverse visual tasks.However, the redundancy present in VIT data leads to substantial computational …

papers.title_en: Beyond Accuracy: An Empirical Study of Perception Stability in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在评估中过度关注准确率而忽视稳定性的问题，开展了感知稳定性的实证研究。通过分析模型在不同任务、领域及评估因子下的表现波动，揭示了现有模型在感知一致性方面的局限，为提升多模态系统的鲁棒性提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are predominantly compared byreporting accuracy on a collection of benchmarks, while paying much less attentionto how stable their performance is across tasks, domains, and evaluation factors …

papers.title_en: Pseudoperplexity Probes Memorization in Protein Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了蛋白质语言模型（pLMs）在处理冗余训练数据时，究竟是掌握了蛋白质的统计规律还是仅靠记忆。研究者提出利用伪困惑度（Pseudoperplexity）作为探测工具，量化了模型对训练序列的记忆程度。结果表明，模型规模和数据重复性显著影响记忆效应，该发现为评估pLMs的泛化能力提供了新视角，有助于优化未来模型的训练策略。
papers.abstract_en: Protein Language Models (pLMs) have significantly advanced computationalbiology. Yet their scale and reliance on redundant training data raise a fundamentalquestion: do pLMs generalize the statistical grammar of proteins, or do they simply …

papers.title_en: Understanding Temporal Logic Consistency in Video-Language Models through Cross-Modal Attention Discriminability
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视频语言模型（Video-LLMs）在处理时间逻辑时经常出现自我矛盾、可靠性不足的问题，提出通过跨模态注意力判别力来分析和理解其时间逻辑一致性。文章探讨了模型内部注意力机制如何影响输出的逻辑连贯性，并为提升视频理解任务中的逻辑稳定性提供了新的视角和评估方法，旨在增强模型在复杂动态场景下的推理可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) often generate self-contradictory outputs, whichseverely impacts their reliability and hinders their adoption in practical applications.In video-language models (Video-LLMs), this phenomenon recently draws the …

papers.title_en: Stabilizing Recurrent Dynamics for Test-Time Scalable Latent Reasoning in Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对循环语言模型（LoopLMs）在推理时增加迭代深度会导致性能崩溃的问题，探讨了稳定循环动力学的方法。LoopLMs通过深度递归实现高效的潜在推理，但其测试时缩放行为不稳定。本文通过分析并优化递归过程中的状态转换，解决了性能随迭代次数增加而下降的难题，实现了更可靠的测试时计算缩放，显著提升了模型在复杂推理任务中的表现。
papers.abstract_en: Looped Language Models (LoopLMs) enable efficient latent reasoning throughdepth recurrence, yet exhibit unreliable test-time scaling behavior: performance oftenpeaks at a certain iteration depth and then collapses with further recurrence. Through …

papers.title_en: How's it going? Reinforcement learning in language models recruits a functional welfare axis
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了强化学习（RL）如何重塑语言模型的内部表示。研究发现，RL 过程会调用模型中预先存在的“功能性福利”（functional welfare）表征，即一种评估系统表现优劣的内部指标。通过分析模型在 RL 训练前后的变化，揭示了模型如何通过这一功能轴来优化其输出，为理解 RL 对模型内部机制的影响提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: How does reinforcement learning shape a language model's internalrepresentations? We present evidence that RL recruits a pre-existing representationof functional welfare: an estimate of how well or badly the system is doing, relative to …

papers.title_en: Decomposed On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Reasoning: Steering Gradients for Visual Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对小规模视觉语言模型在推理任务中的优化难题，挑战了传统的整体式在线蒸馏方法。通过提出“分解式在线蒸馏”框架，研究者将推理过程拆解，并引入梯度引导机制以强化视觉定位能力。该方法有效解决了多模态领域中监督信号密度不足的问题，显著提升了小模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现和视觉证据关联能力。
papers.abstract_en: While on-policy distillation offers dense supervision for training small reasoningmodels, its optimization dynamics in the multimodal domain remain under-explored.In this work, we challenge the standard monolithic view of Vision-Language Model …

papers.title_en: Data-Efficient Autoregressive-to-Diffusion Language Models via On-Policy Distillation
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种高效的转换框架，旨在将预训练的自回归语言模型（ARLM）转化为扩散语言模型（DLM）。该方法摒弃了从零开始的预训练，通过将ARLM的因果注意力机制替换为双向注意力，并引入同策略蒸馏技术，实现了对现有模型知识的有效迁移。这种方法在显著降低数据和计算需求的同时，提升了扩散模型在语言生成任务中的表现，为构建高效扩散语言模型提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: We study the transformation of autoregressive models (ARLMs) into diffusionlanguage models (DLMs). Rather than pretraining from scratch, prior work replacesthe causal attention in ARLMs with bidirectional attention and then trains the …

papers.title_en: Data-Constrained Language Model Pretraining: Improved Regularization and Scaling Laws
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在高质量数据供应不足、计算资源相对充裕的背景下，如何优化语言模型的预训练。传统缩放法则假设数据充足且仅训练一轮，而本文研究了多轮迭代训练的影响。通过实验，作者提出了一套改进的正则化策略和针对数据受限场景的新缩放法则，揭示了在有限数据下通过增加计算量和模型规模仍能提升性能的规律，为未来数据稀缺环境下的模型训练提供了重要指导。
papers.abstract_en: Classical scaling laws for language model pretraining balance model size againsttraining dataset size under a fixed compute budget, assuming abundant data and asingle pass over the corpus. As training compute grows faster than the supply of …
